events.name: Cleveland Cavaliers at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — OG Anunoby had 24 points and 14 rebounds, Jalen Brunson scored 23 points and the New York Knicks beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 119-111 on Wednesday night in their first game under coach Mike Brown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Anunoby, Brunson lead Knicks to a 119-111 victory over the Cavaliers in Mike Brown's first game

headlines.description: — Brandon Miller scored 25 points in his first game since Jan. 15, Miles Bridges added 18 points and 11 rebounds, and the Charlotte Hornets defeated the Brooklyn Nets 136-117 in their season opener Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brandon Miller scores 25 in return as Hornets beat Nets 136-117 in season opener

headlines.description: — Paolo Banchero and Franz Wagner scored 24 points each, Desmond Bane added 23 in his Orlando debut, and the Magic beat the Miami Heat 125-121 on Wednesday night in the season opener for both teams.

headlines.description: — RJ Barrett scored 25 points and Brandon Ingram added 16 points and nine rebounds in his Toronto debut as the Raptors ran away from the Atlanta Hawks for a 138-118 victory Wednesday night in the season opener for both teams.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raptors set team scoring record for season opener in 138-118 win over Hawks

headlines.description: — Tyrese Maxey scored 40 points and VJ Edgecombe added 34 in his NBA debut to help the Philadelphia 76ers rally to beat the Boston Celtics 117-116 in their season opener Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maxey scores 40 points as 76ers rally to beat Celtics 117-116

headlines.description: — Nikola Vucevic had 28 points and 14 rebounds, Matas Buzelis scored 21 points and the Chicago Bulls regrouped after blowing a 23-point lead to beat the Detroit Pistons 115-111 in their opener Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vucevic, Buzelis, Giddey lead way, Bulls beat Pistons 115-111 after blowing big lead

headlines.description: — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 37 points and 14 rebounds, and the Milwaukee Bucks never trailed in a 133-120, season-opening victory over the Washington Wizards on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giannis Antetokounmpo scores 37 points as Bucks open their season with 133-120 win over Wizards

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 40 points and 15 rebounds in a highlight-reel return, helping the San Antonio Spurs spoil No. 1 overall pick Cooper Flagg's debut in a 125-92 rout of the Dallas Mavericks on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama scores 40 as Spurs spoil Flagg debut with 125-92 rout of Mavericks

headlines.description: — Anthony Edwards had 41 points and the Minnesota Timberwolves rallied late in the fourth quarter for a 118-114 season-opening win over the Portland Trail Blazers on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Edwards has 41 points and Timberwolves rally to beat the Trail Blazers 118-114
